description:
Xposed module to clean up Android's Share Sheet

Xposed module that cleans up Android's Share Sheet.

Features:

  • Hide Direct Share suggestions and block share target profiling
  • Hide Quick Share / Nearby Share
  • Delete shared screenshots after sharing (root required)
  • Built-in settings app

Requirements:

  • Android 11 or higher and AOSP rom
  • LSPosed framework
